title: Green Industrial Partnership: UK - Norway memorandum of understanding
body: "The objective of the UK - Norway Green Industrial Partnership is to facilitate green transition and the path to net zero. It is designed to complement the longstanding energy relationship between both countries and explore new initiatives and areas of co-operation.  It includes commitments on:   critical global supply chains Carbon Capture, Usage & Storage and hydrogen development protection of subsea and offshore infrastructure in the North Sea support for a robust pipeline of green skills and expertise knowledge exchange on Offshore Hybrid Assets efficient electricity trading arrangements co-ordinated climate diplomacy and partnership to enhance efforts to halt and reverse deforestation and forest degradation  "
